description: Removing and installing or replacing cylinder head cover gasket (valve cover gasket)
notes: Refer to BMW TIS Group 11 for proper tightening sequence and torque specifications for N55/B58 powerplants.

description: Replacing drive belt deflection pulley and mechanical belt tensioner assembly
notes: Inspect alternator pulley alignment and clean all trace engine oils from accessory drive path.

description: Replacing rear main crankshaft oil seal (transmission decoupled)
notes: Requires flywheel removal tool and specialized crankshaft sealing guide mandate.

description: Replacing both hydraulic engine mounts (left and right assemblies)
notes: Requires engine support fixture from above; ensure vacuum control lines are reconnected on electronic mounts.

description: Replacing complete automatic transmission mechatronic control unit
notes: Requires prior SATELLITE/TeileClearing approval code. Includes transmission fluid fill and specialized adaptation resetting.

description: Renewing automatic transmission oil pan filter assembly and fluid exchange
notes: Standard customer pay maintenance task; fluid level verification sequence must be executed between 30C and 50C.

description: Replacing transmission selector lever electronic module switch assembly
notes: Requires center console trim disassembly; perform subsequent functional checks on shift interlock mechanism.

description: Replacing front brake pads and wear sensor pin
notes: Eligible under Ultimate Care+ only if pad lining drops under 3.0mm thickness threshold.

description: Replacing front brake pads, brake discs (rotors), and wear sensor
notes: Measure rotor thickness; clean hub mounting surfaces meticulously to eliminate wheel runout vibration anomalies.

description: Replacing rear brake pads and integrated wear sensor
notes: Requires workshop activation of electronic parking brake service mode prior to piston retraction.

description: Flushing brake hydraulic fluid pressure system and renewing fluid
notes: Time-dependent maintenance operation (24-month intervals). Use genuine BMW DOT 4 Low Viscosity fluid.

description: Replacing front lower wishbone control arms (both sides)
notes: Control arm bush fasteners must be torqued exclusively under normal vehicle ride height load constraints.

description: Replacing front suspension strut dampers and top guide bearings (left and right)
notes: Spring compressor tool usage mandatory; wheel alignment check required immediately following reassembly.

description: Replacing Electronic Power Steering (EPS) rack and pinion assembly
notes: Requires technical authorization code. Mandatory vehicle tracking alignment and EPS software adaptation calibration.

description: Four-wheel tracking alignment adjustment and KDS sensor setup
notes: BMW KDS alignment system must be utilized with appropriate vehicle ride-height ballast weights positioned.

description: Replacing 12V AGM main vehicle battery assembly
notes: Battery registration must be completed using ISTA to update the DME charging map logs.

description: Replacing high-output engine alternator assembly
notes: Disconnect main vehicle battery safety terminal prior to executing repair line steps.

description: Replacing Head Unit High (HU-H) iDrive control infotainment module
notes: Parts clearing approval required. Component protection unlock and full software flash required post-installation.

description: Replacing Body Domain Controller (BDC) control module
notes: Requires key assignment recovery and synchronization via the secure BMW backend interface system.

description: Replacing A/C refrigerant compressor and checking system sealing
notes: Evacuate and recharge utilizing R1234yf or R134a equipment according to the underhood specification label.

description: Replacing interior heater blower motor and integrated resistor pack
notes: Access achieved through passenger footwell housing; check air distribution ducts for debris presence.

description: Replacing complete HVAC climate control housing evaporator core assembly
notes: Extensive procedure requiring absolute removal of front instrument panel, dashboard trim, and steering column structure.

description: Replacing microfilter / active charcoal passenger compartment air filters
notes: Standard scheduled maintenance line item covered under base Ultimate Care provisions.

description: Replacing central driveshaft flex disc coupling (Guibo joint)
notes: Requires lowering mid-section exhaust shielding; replace self-locking fasteners with new hardware.

description: Replacing rear axle final drive differential assembly
notes: Requires specialized final drive lifting cradles. Fill with approved SAF-X0 synthetic gear lubricants.

description: Replacing xDrive electronic transfer case assembly (ATC series)
notes: Requires technical clearing ticket confirmation. Execute VTG calibration adjustments post-installation.

description: Replacing exterior rocker panel side skirt cosmetic trim panel
notes: Check integrity of underlying body plastic expanding clips; ensure correct paint variant matching.

description: Replacing front door weatherstrip inner body perimeter seal
notes: Clean metal flange surface thoroughly before rolling on the fresh tensioned body seal.

description: Replacing front side window glass mechanical regulator and electric motor drive
notes: Requires inner door trim panel separation; complete anti-trapping protection initialization protocol.

description: Programming/coding complete vehicle control units (complete target I-Level flash)
notes: Connect external charger stabilizing vehicle voltage above 13.0V. Interrupted programming requires immediate TSARA contact.

description: Executing vehicle diagnostic test plan via ISTA platform system
notes: Standard diagnostic flat rate unit allocation. Log files must be actively transmitted to the BMW technical database.

description: Replacing electric engine coolant pump and integrated thermostat assembly
notes: Must execute automated electronic bleeding sequence (hold accelerator down 10 seconds with ignition on) post fill.

description: Replacing High Pressure Fuel Pump (HPFP) assembly
notes: Relieve system residual fuel pressure before line removal. Inspect cam lobe surfaces for scoring damage.

description: Replacing front axle drive output shaft assembly (left or right xDrive)
notes: Replace hub axle collar bolt; torque to factory specification plus angle turn protocol.

description: Replacing rear suspension stabilizer sway bar link assemblies
notes: Verify torque figures with suspension in normalized loaded rest state.

description: Replacing steering column switch cluster assembly (SZL module)
notes: Steering angle sensor calibration calibration steps are mandatory in ISTA following mounting.

description: Replacing digital instrument cluster display assembly
notes: Requires mileage synchronization validation lock via secure ISTA connection link.

description: Replacing center console armrest console lid latch assembly
notes: Interior trim pieces should be disassembled using specialized non-marring nylon pry bars exclusively.

description: Replacing A/C condenser unit assembly with dryer cartridge insert
notes: Inspect face of radiator cooling modules for debris build-up when condenser is detached.

description: Replacing engine lower oil pan assembly gasket
notes: Requires absolute removal or dropping of front subframe carrier member; alignment check mandatory post-op.
